lines.speaker: Assistant Le Smith
lines.text: Do you want to use the balloon? Just so you know, some locations require special logs and high Firemaking skills.

lines.speaker: Assistant Le Smith
lines.text: I am Assistant Le Smith. I used to work as a glider pilot, but they kicked me off.

lines.speaker: Assistant Le Smith
lines.text: They said I was too full of hot air.

lines.speaker: Assistant Le Smith
lines.text: Do you want to use the balloon?
